title: Bridge Essay: The spiritual brain: selective cortical lesions modulate human self-transcendenc

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**The spiritual brain: selective cortical lesions modulate human self-transcendence.** — Neuron. PMID: 20159445. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2010.01.026. The predisposition of human beings toward spiritual feeling, thinking, and behaviors is measured by asupposedly stable personality trait called self-transcendence. Although afew neuroimaging studies suggest that neural activation of alarge fronto-parieto-temporal network may underpin avariety of spiritual experiences, information on the causative link between such anetwork and spirituality is lacking. Combining pre- and post-neurosurgery personality assessment with advanced brain-lesion map...
